arts.ttl: Papers: Man Utd told £40m will land them Mateta
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Sunday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Man Utd v Arsenal: Key stats before Sunday's game
arts.sum: We look at the numbers behind Manchester United and Arsenal's seasons to explain their current positions.

arts.ttl: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard's ruthless admission on what's happened to him this season
arts.sum: The Arsenal captain has shone in both of the last two seasons but hasn't hit his own high standards this term and admits he's been "nowhere near" his best

arts.ttl: Arsenal will fight to the death for Premier League title – Martin Odegaard
arts.sum: Arsenal’s clash at Old Trafford will mark the first of their concluding 11 matches in the league.

arts.ttl: Ødegaard admits he has ‘not been good enough’ for Arsenal this season
arts.sum: Midfielder unhappy with his goal and assist return Captain hopes midweek double is a turning point Martin Ødegaard has admitted he has “not been good enough” this season, particularly in regards to his goals and assists output. The Arsenal captain has pulled no punches in his assessment of a campaign that was undermined by a two-month ankle injury layoff from early September. Ødegaard was back to his driving and creative best in Arsenal’s 7-1 win at PSV Eindhoven in the Champions League last-16 first leg on Tuesday, scoring two and providing one assist. As he prepares for Sunday’s Premier League visit to Manchester United, he hopes it can mark a turning point. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man Utd told Mateta to cost £40m - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United told price for Jean-Philippe Mateta, Fulham also set Antonee Robinson valuation and West Ham begin Tammy Abraham talks.

arts.ttl: Record Arsenal vs Man Utd appearances XI from Premier League era
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome Arsenal to Old Trafford on Sunday afternoon for the next chapter of one of the fiercest rivalries in the Premier League era. Before Chelsea and...

arts.ttl: Gyokeres and Osimhen transfers taking shape as Arsenal move for No.9 sensation
arts.sum: Gyokeres and Osimhen transfers taking shape as Arsenal move for No.9 sensation Arsenal registered their interest in a Serie A wonderkid and Chelsea began mulling over a €50 million offer for a reliable defender.

arts.ttl: Mason Greenwood is DROPPED by Roberto De Zerbi - just days after Marseille manager's pointed comments about former Man United forward
arts.sum: Mason Greenwood has been dropped by Roberto De Zerbi after the Marseille manager admitted he was unimpressed with the Englishman despite his fine scoring form.

arts.ttl: Arsenal set for £10.5m cash injection after breaking Champions League record
arts.sum: Arsenal have all but booked their place in the Champions League quarter-finals after thrashing PSV 7-1 in Eindhoven but Liverpool and Aston Villa are also chasing lucrative financial bonuses as they bid to see off Paris Saint-Germain and Club Brugge, respectively
